phrases.text_local: Onde fica a farmácia mais próxima?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH fuh-ruh-MAHS-yuh MEYESH PRAW-see-muh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao porteiro ou ao segurança na praça central.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh NUH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the door staff or security at the main square.

responses.english: Ask the door staff or security at the main square.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh NUH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte ao porteiro ou ao segurança na praça central.

phrases.text_local: O senhor pode recomendar um restaurante bom perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: AW sih-NYOHR PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih BOHNG PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Sim, há bons restaurantes por perto. Se quiser uma recomendação específica, o porteiro ou um empregado de mesa podem ajudar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, AH BOHNGSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh POOR PEHR-too. SIH kee-ZEHR OO-muh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOWN shpeh-SEE-fee-kuh, AW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are good restaurants nearby. If you want a specific recommendation, the doorman or a waiter can help.

responses.english: Yes, there are good restaurants nearby. If you want a specific recommendation, the doorman or a waiter can help.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, AH BOHNGSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh POOR PEHR-too. SIH kee-ZEHR OO-muh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOWN shpeh-SEE-fee-kuh, AW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
responses.local: Sim, há bons restaurantes por perto. Se quiser uma recomendação específica, o porteiro ou um empregado de mesa podem ajudar.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso reservar uma mesa no Strip?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zih-ruh-VAHR OO-muh MEH-zuh NOO STREEP?
phrases.cultural_note: Table reservation desks are common along the main strip in Albufeira, especially on Rua 25 de Abril.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao porteiro ou no balcão de reservas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the door staff or at the reservation desk.

responses.english: Ask the door staff or at the reservation desk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao porteiro ou no balcão de reservas.

phrases.text_local: Pode sugerir um restaurante para jantar?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih soo-zhih-REER OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih PUH-ruh zhahnng-TAHR?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao porteiro ou ao segurança na entrada do The Strip; eles conhecem as melhores opções.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO ehn-UHPTPT STREEP; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng UHSH meh-LYOH-rihsh awp-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the door staff or security at the entrance of The Strip; they know the best options.

responses.english: Ask the door staff or security at the entrance of The Strip; they know the best options.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO ehn-UHPTPT STREEP; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng UHSH meh-LYOH-rihsh awp-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao porteiro ou ao segurança na entrada do The Strip; eles conhecem as melhores opções.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os multibancos nesta zona?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH moow-tee-BAHNNG-koosh NEHSH-tuh ZOH-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: ATMs cluster near the main square for tourist convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, multibancos na Praça da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, moow-tee-BAHNNG-koosh NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, ATMs at Praça da República.

responses.english: Good day, ATMs at Praça da República.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, moow-tee-BAHNNG-koosh NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, multibancos na Praça da República.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao final da faixa, onde há uma praça de táxis.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW fee-NAHL DUH FEYE-shuh, OHNG-dih AH OO-muh PRAH-suh DIH TAHK-seesh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the end of the strip, where there is a taxi rank.

responses.english: Go to the end of the strip, where there is a taxi rank.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW fee-NAHL DUH FEYE-shuh, OHNG-dih AH OO-muh PRAH-suh DIH TAHK-seesh.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao final da faixa, onde há uma praça de táxis.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pagar o cover da discoteca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo puh-GAHR AW koo-VEHR DUH deesh-koo-TEH-kuh?

likely_response.local: Pode pagar na entrada, com o segurança ou o porteiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH ayngt-RAH-duh, KOHM AW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh OHW AW poo-ruh-TAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I pay the club cover? You can pay at the entrance, with the security or door staff.

responses.english: Where can I pay the club cover? You can pay at the entrance, with the security or door staff.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH ayngt-RAH-duh, KOHM AW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh OHW AW poo-ruh-TAY-roo.
responses.local: Pode pagar na entrada, com o segurança ou o porteiro.
